tools.name: bash_tool
tools.description: Run a bash command in the container. Write to /home/assistant (the per-session writable workspace, wiped when the session ends) or /tmp (ephemeral scratch). Read user-shared files at /mnt/user-data/uploads (read-only). Save files the user should keep or download to /mnt/user-data/outputs, where they appear in the user's Files panel; list it to verify a deliverable.

tools.name: str_replace
tools.description: Replace a single occurrence of a string in a file. Edit files under /home/assistant (the writable workspace) or /mnt/user-data/outputs (deliverables; /mnt/user-data/uploads is read-only). The old_str must match exactly once; the edit is refused if it is missing or ambiguous.

tools.name: create_file
tools.description: Create a file with the given contents. Use /home/assistant for per-session working files (wiped at session end) or /tmp for ephemeral scratch. Write to /mnt/user-data/outputs to save a file the user should keep or download — files there appear in the user's Files panel (/mnt/user-data/uploads is the user's read-only upload area). The rootfs outside these paths is read-only.

tools.name: view
tools.description: View the contents of a file with line numbers. Read files under /home/assistant (the writable workspace), /mnt/user-data/uploads (user-shared files), /mnt/user-data/outputs (your deliverables), or /tmp. Pass the exact file path.
